response:
Here’s a simple comparison table in plain text (no heavy formatting):

TCP vs UDP Comparison
---------------------
Feature | TCP | UDP
------- | --- | ---
Connection | Connection‑oriented | Connectionless
Reliability | Reliable (error checking, retransmission, acknowledgments) | Unreliable (no guarantee of delivery)
Data Order | Ensures ordered delivery | Order not guaranteed
Speed | Slower due to overhead | Faster with minimal overhead
Use Cases | Web browsing (HTTP/HTTPS), email, file transfer | Streaming, gaming, VoIP, DNS
Packet Handling | Large packets, flow control, congestion control | Small packets, no flow or congestion control
Overhead | Higher (more headers, checks) | Lower (lightweight header)

If you'd like, I can also give examples or diagrams.
